final:
module RefModule (
    input wire J,
    input wire K,
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    output reg Q
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
    begin end  // redundant
    if (rst) begin
        Q <= 0;
    end else begin
        case ({J, K})
            2'b00: Q <= Q;      // No change
            2'b01: Q <= 0;      // Reset
            2'b10: Q <= 1;      // Set
            2'b11: Q <= ~Q;     // Toggle
        endcase
    end
end

endmodule
